zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Moray於1315年出生在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾格拉斯哥時，她的父親John Moray 2nd of Drumsgard35歲，母親Mary de Strathearn23歲。她於1338年與William Fraser of Touchfaser, of Cowie and Durris在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾阿爾迪結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1364年享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Moray于1315年出生在英国苏格兰藍納可爾格拉斯哥时，她的父亲John Moray 2nd of Drumsgard35岁，母亲Mary de Strathearn23岁。她于1338年与William Fraser of Touchfaser, of Cowie and Durris在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾阿爾迪结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1364年享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Moray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Spanish: topographic name for someone who lived by a mulberry tree, moral, or a habitational name from any of the places called with this word. Compare Del Moral .

variants.name: Del Moral
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Antonio, Armando, Luis, Mario, Roberto, Alicia, Ana, Carlos, Engracia, Jorge, Juan Manuel.
Spanish: variant, with the preposition and definite article del ‘from the’, of Moral ‘mulberry tree’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Moray was born in 1315, in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, John Moray 2nd of Drumsgard, was 35 and her mother, Mary de Strathearn, was 23. She married William Fraser of Touchfaser, of Cowie and Durris in 1338, in Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1364, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Moray est née en 1315, à Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Moray 2nd of Drumsgard, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Mary de Strathearn, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé William Fraser of Touchfaser, of Cowie and Durris en 1338, à Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1364, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Moray 1315 in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Moray 2nd of Drumsgard 35 und ihre Mutter Mary de Strathearn 23. Sie hat 1338 in Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland William Fraser of Touchfaser, of Cowie and Durris geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1364 im Alter von 49 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Moray è nata il nel 1315 nel Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Moray 2nd of Drumsgard, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Mary de Strathearn, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato William Fraser of Touchfaser, of Cowie and Durris nel 1338, nel Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1364, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Morayが1315年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアグラスゴウで生まれた時，父John Moray 2nd of Drumsgardは35歳，母Mary de Strathearnは23歳であった。1338年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアアバーディーンでWilliam Fraser of Touchfaser, of Cowie and Durrisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1364年に49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Moray(이)가 1315년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 글라스고에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Moray 2nd of Drumsgard(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary de Strathearn(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1338년 스컷랜드 압르디실르 압르디에서 William Fraser of Touchfaser, of Cowie and Durris(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1364년 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Moray nasceu em 1315, em Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Moray 2nd of Drumsgard, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Mary de Strathearn, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com William Fraser of Touchfaser, of Cowie and Durris em 1338, em Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1364, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Moray родилась в 1315 г. в местности гласгоу, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Moray 2nd of Drumsgard было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary de Strathearn, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Fraser of Touchfaser, of Cowie and Durris в 1338 г. в местности абирдин, абирдиншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1364 г. в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Moray nació en 1315, en Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, John Moray 2nd of Drumsgard, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Mary de Strathearn, tenía 23 años. Se casó con William Fraser of Touchfaser, of Cowie and Durris en 1338, en Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1364, a la edad de 49 años.
